channel.title: AI·Brief — Daily Tech Intelligence
channel.description: Automated AI-powered tech news briefings updated every 3 hours.

item.title: Apple Unveils Third-Gen Foundation Models
item.description: Apple introduced its third generation of Foundation Models at WWDC26, featuring local and cloud-based AI capabilities. Here's a breakdown of their functionalities.

item.title: iOS 27 Introduces New Health Features
item.description: iOS 27 beta reveals new health and fitness features, despite the cancellation of an AI health service. Users can expect improved health tracking capabilities.

item.title: Amazon Echo Hub Gets Major Update
item.description: Amazon's Echo Hub now features a customizable home screen, Alexa Plus video summaries, and Ring AI video search capabilities. Users can personalize their smart display experience.

item.title: Niantic Confirms No Data Sharing with Drone Company
item.description: Niantic Spatial clarifies that it no longer shares Pokémon Go data with the drone company following its acquisition by Scopely. Data privacy remains a priority.

item.title: WhatsApp Expands Multi-Account Support on iOS
item.description: WhatsApp is rolling out multi-account support on iOS, fulfilling a highly requested feature. Users can now manage multiple accounts seamlessly.

item.title: iPhone Ultra Set to Launch This Fall
item.description: Apple's first foldable iPhone, rumored to be called iPhone Ultra, is expected to launch this fall with six new features. Anticipation builds for this innovative device.

item.title: Trump Phone Revealed as HTC Clone
item.description: Teardown of the Trump Mobile T1 reveals it is nearly identical to the HTC U24 Pro, with minor modifications. The phone's origins raise questions about its uniqueness.

item.title: Telegram Revives Wear OS App After Five Years
item.description: Telegram has reintroduced its Wear OS app, allowing Android smartwatch users to access chats and voice messages. This marks a significant return after five years.

item.title: Xbox Considers In-Game Ads for Affordability
item.description: Xbox's chief strategist suggests in-game ads could help keep products affordable and fund development teams. This proposal aims to balance user experience and costs.

item.title: Halo: Campaign Evolved Pre-Release Comparison
item.description: A comparison of Halo: Campaign Evolved on Xbox Series X and Ally X shows notable differences based on early footage. Fans eagerly await the game's release.

item.title: Chatbots' Repeated Stories About Elias Thorne
item.description: Chatbots frequently reference a character named Elias Thorne, raising questions about their creativity. A new study explores this phenomenon.

item.title: Mina The Hollower's Unique Game Finale Explained
item.description: Developers of Mina The Hollower discuss a Chrono Trigger-style twist in the game's finale, enhancing player experience. The game features seven main dungeons.

item.title: New GreatXML Exploit Bypasses Windows BitLocker
item.description: A new exploit named GreatXML can bypass Windows BitLocker, exposing encrypted data. This vulnerability raises security concerns for users.

item.title: DJI Sues Insta360 Over Patent Violations
item.description: DJI has filed lawsuits against Insta360 for allegedly violating multiple patents related to its Osmo Pocket products. The legal battle centers on design and functionality.

item.title: Windows 11 Low Latency Profile CPU Boost Available
item.description: Microsoft has released a cumulative update for Windows 11, enhancing CPU performance for the Start Menu. Users can expect improved responsiveness.
